description_long: This object is a compact, futuristic robot dog with a smooth, metallic gray body accented by geometric blue and green highlights. Its head features two prominent, glowing green circular eyes and pointed ears, giving it a friendly yet high-tech appearance. The body is segmented with visible panel lines and mechanical joints at the legs and tail, suggesting articulated movement. The back displays a rectangular green-lit panel, while the tail is rounded and tipped with a luminous green section, possibly functioning as a light or indicator. The legs are short and sturdy, with black pads on the feet, and the overall form is rounded and robust, evoking a playful yet durable companion. The design incorporates several visible sensors and LED indicators, making it suitable for interactive urban environments.
description: A compact, metallic gray robot dog with glowing green eyes, geometric accents, and articulated limbs, featuring illuminated panels and a rounded, futuristic design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot dog's face with glowing green eyes, pointed ears, and a smooth, rounded snout.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the segmented body, geometric blue markings, and the green-lit panel on the back, as well as the articulated legs and tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rounded tail with a luminous green tip, the back panel, and the symmetrical design of the hind legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same mechanical joints, blue markings, and the green-lit tail, with clear articulation in the limbs.
